recommendations.title: Show Dogs
recommendations.overview: Max, a macho, solitary Rottweiler police dog is ordered to go undercover as a primped show dog in a prestigious Dog Show, along with his human partner, to avert a disaster from happening.

recommendations.title: Big Momma's House
recommendations.overview: When a street-smart FBI agent is sent to Georgia to protect a beautiful single mother and her son from an escaped convict, he is forced to impersonate a crass Southern granny known as Big Momma in order to remain incognito.

recommendations.title: Yours, Mine & Ours

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb The Movie: Across the 2nd Dimension
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Action
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb get trapped in an alternate dimension where the evil Doofenshmirtz rules the tri-state area. They must find a way back home with the help of their pet platypus named Perry, who they discover is a secret agent.
